author: lOrm
content: Verified still present at src/tui/app.rs:906-911 (HEAD 3c860e85, was cited as :659-664 before the file grew). The is_some()-then-unwrap pattern is unchanged. Tiny fix: collapse to 'if let Some(overlay) = self.overlay.as_mut() { let action = match overlay { ... }; ... }'. Leaving open for a future code-dispatch pass — this is a 3-line mechanical edit that does not need architectural triage.
